scripts.generate:events: mkdir -p generated/events && protoc -I ../../../api/proto/events --plugin=protoc-gen-es=../../../node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-es --es_out=generated/events --es_opt=target=js+dts,import_extension=js ../../../api/proto/events/peer_event.proto && prettier --write --ignore-path /dev/null generated/events/peer_event_pb.js generated/events/peer_event_pb.d.ts
